roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, PasarGuard integration, Plisio, D1 authority and persistent schema-revision fast path
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps and latency-sensitive Telegram handling
roles.processor: report retries, topic repair, daily reports, backups and background jobs

features: prevent the first request of every fresh Cloudflare isolate from replaying the complete D1 schema and migration sweep
persist a db_schema_revision marker in D1 after a successful migration
reduce the cold-idle database bootstrap path to one lightweight revision query when the database is current
keep full migrations available for fresh installs and future schema revisions
preserve Plisio, automatic USD-to-toman rates, report topics and PasarGuard 5.1 API support

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.cold_schema_fast_path: static assertion passed; current schema returns after one marker lookup
validation.fresh_install_fallback: static assertion passed; missing app_settings falls through to full bootstrap
validation.migration_marker_write: static assertion passed; marker is stored only after migration completes
validation.live_cloudflare_latency: not run; no deployed Worker environment was supplied
